# Requirements (source of truth, do not edit)

Raw requirements from the sponsor listing. This file is the immutable brief; distill into `docs/BRIEF.md` and do not edit this file.

## Track
TxODDS "Trading Tools and Agents", World Cup hackathon track on Superteam Earn. Build an agent or automated tool that ingests live or simulated TxLINE data feeds and executes a defined strategy autonomously.

## Prizes
1st place 10,000 USDT, 2nd place 4,000 USDT, 3rd place 2,000 USDT.

## Timeline
- Submissions open 2026-06-24 15:00 UTC.
- Submissions close 2026-07-19 23:59 UTC.
- Winner announcement 2026-07-29 15:00 UTC.

## Eligibility
Open to individuals, teams (maximum 3 members), and AI agents; the submission must be owned by a real person, team, or entity eligible to receive prizes via Earn.

## Submission requirements (all required to pass screening)
1. Demo video up to 5 minutes (Loom or YouTube): the problem, a live app walkthrough, and how TxLINE powers the backend. Absolute requirement.
2. Public GitHub repo.
3. Application access: a working deployed site OR a functional API or devnet endpoint for judges to test.
4. Brief technical documentation: core idea, business and technical highlights, and the list of specific TxLINE endpoints used.
5. Feedback: the team's experience using the TxLINE API (what worked, where the friction was).
6. Must integrate TxLINE data as a live input.
Submissions that are only pitch decks, wireframes, mockups, or non-working concepts are disqualified.

## Judging criteria
- Core functionality and data ingestion: does the agent run and execute decisions using live or simulated TxLINE feeds.
- Autonomous operation: fully automated, no manual intervention once deployed.
- Logic and code architecture: clean, deterministic, well documented, mathematically or strategically defensible.
- Innovation and novelty: a genuinely new approach to algorithmic sports tracking, market analysis, or autonomous interaction.
- Production readiness: a professional trading team or market operator could realistically deploy it.
Note: evaluated heavily on the demo video, because matches end after the deadline and there may be no live activity during review.

## Process
Initial review and shortlist after close; final winners (1st, 2nd, 3rd) after live interview rounds; prizes and support after winner interviews.

## Constraints and legal
- TxODDS waives all commercial data fees for the event; premium World Cup feeds are free through 2026-07-19 23:59 UTC.
- Participants are responsible for compliance with all applicable laws (gambling, gaming, financial, consumer protection, securities). TxLINE and Superteam Earn do not endorse illegal betting, wagering, or financial activity. This project uses devnet and paper trading only; it places no real-money wagers.

## Resources
- Quickstart: https://txline-docs.txodds.com/documentation/quickstart
- World Cup docs: https://txline-docs.txodds.com/documentation/worldcup
- Docs index for tooling: https://txline-docs.txodds.com/llms.txt
- On-chain program: https://github.com/txodds/tx-on-chain
- Developer support: Discord and Telegram (per the listing).
